title: Typing indicator component with multiple states
purpose: Displays different UI indicators based on the agent's current state during chat interactions.
module_context: Exports a TypingIndicatorState type and TypingIndicatorProps interface, along with the main TypingIndicator component function.

steps.content: IF the state is idle, return null to show no indicator.
IF the state is thinking, render a pulsing dot and 'Thinking…' text.
IF the state is streaming, render 'Streaming…' text with bouncing dots.
ELSE if the state is running_tools, render a spinning loader and 'Running tools…' text.
